---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
```{=html}
<style>
  .about-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
    min-height: 100vh;
  }

  /* sticky left */
.about-left {
    padding: 64px 48px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 32px;
  }
  .about-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .about-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
  .about-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-top: 24px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
    .about-nav {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  .about-nav-item {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .about-nav-item:hover { color: #1a1916; text-decoration: none; }

  /* scrolling right */
  .about-right {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .about-section {
    padding: 64px 64px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .about-section-title {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .about-section-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.8;
    max-width: 560px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  /* photo grids */
  .photo-grid-2 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .photo-grid-3 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }
  .photo-item {
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #f7f5f1;
  }
  .photo-item img {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1/1;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    display: block;
  }
  .photo-caption {
    padding: 12px 14px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #a8a59e;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  /* running stats */
  .running-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 40px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    padding-bottom: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.08);
  }
  .run-stat-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 38px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #1a1916;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .run-stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
</style>

<div class="about-wrapper">

  <!-- STICKY LEFT -->
  <div class="about-left">
    <div>
      <p class="about-eyebrow">Cristina Jackson</p>
      <h1 class="about-title">Beyond<br>the<br>Resume</h1>
      <p class="about-desc">Photography, dogs, running, and everything in between — the side of me that doesn't fit on a CV.</p>
    </div>
    <nav class="about-nav">
      <a class="about-nav-item" href="#photography">Photography</a>
      <a class="about-nav-item" href="#pets">Ollie & Buster</a>
      <a class="about-nav-item" href="#running">Running</a>
    </nav>
  </div>

  <!-- SCROLLING RIGHT -->
  <div class="about-right">

    <!-- PHOTOGRAPHY -->
    <section class="about-section" id="photography">
      <h2 class="about-section-title">Photography</h2>
      <p class="about-section-desc">I love to travel, explore new places, and take photos of nature. This year I visited Laguna Beach with my sister and mom and caught an incredible sunset, and explored Joshua Tree for the first time — the rock formations are unlike anything I've seen.</p>
      <div class="photo-grid-2">
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_1813.jpg" alt="Sunset in Laguna Beach"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Sunset in Laguna Beach</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_2010.jpg" alt="Rocks in Joshua Tree"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Joshua Tree National Park</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- PETS -->
    <section class="about-section" id="pets">
      <h2 class="about-section-title">Ollie & Buster</h2>
      <p class="about-section-desc">I have two dogs, Ollie and Buster. Ollie loves long runs on the beach. Buster's idea of a perfect outing is a walk to Starbucks and a pup cup.</p>
      <div class="photo-grid-3">
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_2671.jpg" alt="Ollie"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Ollie</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_5019.jpg" alt="Buster"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Buster</p>
        </div>
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_0039.jpg" alt="Ollie, Bodie and Mia"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Ollie, Bodie, and Mia</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- RUNNING -->
    <section class="about-section" id="running">
      <h2 class="about-section-title">Running</h2>
      <div class="running-stats">
        <div>
          <div class="run-stat-num">13.1</div>
          <div class="run-stat-label">Miles · SB Half Marathon</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="run-stat-num">4</div>
          <div class="run-stat-label">Years running</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="run-stat-num">∞</div>
          <div class="run-stat-label">Morning miles</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="about-section-desc">I started running freshman year after discovering the trails in the Goleta Monarch Preserve. Sophomore year I ran the Santa Barbara Half Marathon, and since then morning runs have become a non-negotiable part of my day.</p>
      <div class="photo-grid-2" style="max-width: 500px;">
        <div class="photo-item">
          <img src="docs/IMG_3163.jpg" alt="Running in the Monarch Butterfly Preserve"/>
          <p class="photo-caption">Running with Mia in the Monarch Butterfly Preserve</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>
```
